name: fetcher records freshness_status stale in its output when source was fetched outside the window
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch && printf '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/freshness-status.sh" --source cfpb --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h 2>out.txt && grep -q 'freshness_status=stale' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
